title: The Foxglove King
author: Hannah Whitten
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "The Foxglove King" book by Hannah Whitten?
Options:
A. We had talked about this previously. You had discussed this before. Bastian was acting oddly with his hands. They were bending back and forth, fingers curling, seeming like he was attempting to reel in an invisible line. Golden illumination flickered around him. Gabe said he was baffled, retreating another pace. Anton just dangled there limply, eyes gazing skyward, as if beseeching. He's merely a mortal man; transfer his role to another, but spare his life! I'm the damn Sainted King. It wasn't a yell. It was barely more than a murmur. Nonetheless, it reverberated over the crackling of the fire, and when Bastian raised his head, the flames gave the impression of a halo around his head.  
B. We had conversed about this previously. You had talked about this before. Bastian was behaving strangely with his hands. They were flexing back and forth, fingers curling, appearing as if he was trying to haul in an invisible cord. Golden light glimmered around him. Gabe said he was confused, taking a step back. Anton just hung there limply, eyes turned upward, as if appealing. He's just an ordinary man; pass his position to another, but don't end his life! I'm the blasted Sainted King. It wasn't a shout. It was barely louder than a whisper. However, it resonated over the crackling of the fire, and when Bastian lifted his head, the flames formed the illusion of a halo around his head.
C. We talked about this. You talked about this. Bastian was doing something strange with his hands. They flexed back and forth, fingers curling, as if he was trying to wind in an invisible rope. Gold light glimmered in the space around him. Hes confused, Gabe said, backing up another step. Anton hung limp, eyes cast upward, as if in prayer. Hes just a man; take his position, give it to someone else, but dont kill him! Im the fucking Sainted King. It wasnt a scream. It was barely more than a whisper. Still, it reverberated against the hiss of the fire, and when Bastian tilted up his head, the flames seemed to make a halo around his head.
D. We had discussed this previously. You had talked about this before. Bastian was doing something peculiar with his hands. They were flexing back and forth, fingers curling, looking like he was trying to gather an invisible rope. Golden light shimmered around him. Gabe said he was confused, taking another step backward. Anton just hung there limply, eyes looking upward, as if praying. He's just a normal man; give his position to someone else, but don't end his life! I'm the damn Sainted King. It wasn't a scream. It was barely louder than a whisper. Still, it echoed over the hissing of the fire, and when Bastian lifted his head, the flames appeared to form a halo around his head.
Answer:

I'm the damn Sainted King. It wasn't a yell. It was barely more than a murmur. Nonetheless, it reverberated over the crackling of the fire, and when Bastian raised his head, the flames gave the impression of a halo around his head.
